purpose: Active governance enforcement engine preventing invalid execution behavior, enforcing protocol compliance, and preventing governance bypasses.

rules.condition: governance JSON artifact does not validate against its declared schema
rules.description: All canonical JSON artifacts must validate against their governing schemas.

rules.condition: runtime state file is malformed, unparsable, or missing required fields
rules.description: Runtime state files must be valid JSON with expected structure.

rules.condition: protocol definition does not validate against protocol-definition.schema.json
rules.description: All protocol definitions must conform to the protocol definition schema.

rules.condition: milestone has invalid status, missing tickets, or orphaned references
rules.description: Milestone definitions must reference existing tickets and use valid statuses.

rules.condition: ticket dependency references non-existent ticket or creates a cycle
rules.description: Dependency graph must be acyclic and reference only existing entities.

rules.condition: execution state violates state machine invariants such as invalid transitions or terminal state exit
rules.description: Execution state must always conform to the canonical state machine protocol.

invariants.expression: emergency bypass requires mandatory audit event with human authorization
invariants.description: No governance rule may be bypassed without an append-only audit record.

invariants.expression: same inputs always produce identical enforcement outcomes
invariants.description: Enforcement results must be deterministic and reproducible.

invariants.expression: every violation produces an append-only audit record with recovery guidance
invariants.description: All detected violations must be logged for audit and remediation.
